_comment: Order categorisation for tiktok_shop + All-Orders CSV ingestion. Edit + re-run refresh_daily.py — no code change needed.
_notes: Five separately-tracked buckets: net | cancelled | returned | refunded | sample. Inflight (AWAITING_SHIPMENT etc.) is excluded from all.
Net = customer-facing fulfilled orders (Option A). Returns + Refunds = customer paid then got money back. Cancelled = order killed before fulfilment. Sample = order_amount == 0 (free creator sample).

For Windsor tiktok_shop: RETURNED/REFUNDED statuses are NOT exposed as top-level order_status — refunds show up as a separate refund amount on otherwise-completed orders. Track via order_payment_refund_amount when pulled (TODO).
For All-Orders CSV path: filter on 'Cancelation/Return Type' column. Rows where this contains 'Cancel', 'Return', or 'Refund' are excluded from net.
Sample = total_paid below sample_total_paid_threshold AND status in net_order_statuses. Pre-ship samples (AWAITING_SHIPMENT with total_paid=0) stay in inflight until they ship.
